title: Facilities, Racks, Cabling, Power, and Environment · Operations Brief: Net Mdf Idf Racks
summary: Plan an MDF, IDFs, racks, patching, power, cooling, security, and maintenance access for a new site. Planned artifact: Add and verify the net mdf idf racks increment in a facilities-ready network installation package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Place MDF and IDF spaces, rack units, pathways, grounding, clearances, and service loops from building constraints.
Perform predictive and measured surveys and verify RSSI, SNR, interference, utilization, roaming, and application outcomes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
